programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott threw 2 touchdown passes, ran for the tying score and led the drive to Brandon Aubrey's 42-yard field goal as time expired as the Cowboys beat the Philadelphia Eagles 24-21 in a mistake-filled thriller Sunday.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Russell Wilson throws 4 touchdown passes, Greg Zuerlein missed a 44-yard field goal with 11 seconds left, and the Seahawks held on for a 30-29 victory.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns wide receiver Jerry Jeudy's revenge game in Denver was spoiled by Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix and cornerback Ja'Quan McMillian's game-securing pick six.

programme.title: NFL Game of the Week
programme.desc: The 42-year-old Pittsburgh Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers threw for a season-high 294 yards, the last 26 come on a go-ahead scoring pass to Calvin Austin III with 55 seconds left; the Steelers claim their first AFC North title in five years.

programme.desc: Relive the Broncos' 31-24 win over the Indianapolis Colts in Week 1 of the 2014 season. QB Peyton Manning's 3 TD passes lift Denver to a victory over his former team.

programme.title: GolfPass
programme.desc: Get the latest sports updates with Brother From Another, The Dan Patrick Show, PFT Live, and more.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Both teams try their luck in "Take a Chance" and battle for their professional lives. Players are subject to the "Benching Challenge" where cash and elimination are on the line. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The ups and downs of the grueling competition are wearing on the teams as a multitude of events are staged. You can cut the tension with a knife as both teams fall victim to internal fighting that might start to derail the weaker players.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: An overnight rain delay causes more tension when a couple of players must wait another day to compete. Finally, both teams go head-to-head to beat elimination and win cash. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The teams compete in an "Around the World" challenge testing their chipping and putting skills. As the drama unfolds, some friends turn to enemies and survival is put to the test as the teams try to make it one step closer to the finale.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Birds of a Feather Flock Together
programme.desc: Two players become the clear-cut MVPs, while the rest of the competitors do their best to make up lost ground. It's every player for themselves as a short game and closest to the pin challenge result in two unlikely winners.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The most points in any competition are at stake and a player falls ill creating a make-or-break situation for the teams.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: In the finale, the men's and women's team battle it out for cash, prizes and professional exemptions.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Every shot means more than ever as the competitors show what they're made of .... immediately. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal, Korn Ferry Tour player Derek Gillespie, and LPGA player Gerina Mendoza (Piller).

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Who's the guy to beat? Who's the girl to beat? The challenges tell no lies.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A budding "alliance" is put to the test, and an epic showdown demonstrates that everything is possible and nothing is impossible.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Friends and enemies team up and face off as the mental makeup of the remaining competitors is stressed to its breaking point.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Top o' the Mornin' to Ya
programme.desc: It's a matchup they've been dreaming about. One will lose sleep over it no more, and the other will have to deal with the consequences.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One competitor pulls off a shot that was thought to be virtually impossible.

programme.title: The Conor Moore Show

programme.desc: A PSA that takes on cheaters in charity golf scrambles; how surfers and skateboarders are changing golf.

programme.title: Better Off with Hally Leadbetter
programme.desc: Hally is haunted by an apparition; Emilia Migliaccio's decision to join golf media rather than turn pro.

programme.title: Private Lessons

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Since it's Super Bowl week, Martin reveals how kicking a football can improve your golf swing. Martin also shares advice from Jack Nicklaus, Tiger Woods, and Harvey Penick.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: School of Golf
